---
title: "Conceito Urbano Elétrico"
format: html
---

```{ojs}

dados = d3.csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR_kABBziuLQDcgkwtThORXGuhxlp9G1mWXsb9Xv6XzB9T4K47YFWr6oRXahriBjqsIeQgl1pe_stIe/pub?gid=0&single=true&output=csv")


demandas_proto = dados.filter(d => d.Categoria === "Conceito Urbano")


html`${demandas_proto.map(d => `
  <div style="margin-bottom: 10px;">
    <strong>[${d.Setor}]</strong> ${d.Tarefa} - <em>${d.Status}</em>
  </div>
`)}`
```
